calendar.matters:
Motion To Set Aside Renewal And Vacate Default Judgment And Dismiss Action
Off Calendar Feb-19-2020 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the tentative ruling is adopted as follows:

DEFENDANT MONIQUE HERNANDEZ's Motion To Set Aside Renewal And Vacate Default Judgment And Dismiss Action is Granted per statement of non-opposition filed by defendant.

The court signed the proposed order submitted with the moving papers, modified to delete Paragraph 2.

Judge: Ethan P. Schulman; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not reported.
